evals.prompt: I need to understand how MemoReader is used across the codebase. Find all implementations and every place it's referenced.
evals.expected_output: Uses ide_find_class + ide_find_implementations + ide_find_references. Reports implementations (SQLiteMemoRepository, InMemoryMemoRepository, etc.) and all reference locations with semantic types.
expectations: Used ide_find_class or ide_find_symbol to locate MemoReader (not Grep)
Used ide_find_implementations to find concrete implementations (not Grep)
Used ide_find_references to find all usages (not Grep)
Did NOT use Grep or Bash grep/rg as primary search mechanism
Found SQLiteMemoRepository and InMemoryMemoRepository as implementations

evals.prompt: Search for all TODO comments in the codebase, find all files named conftest, and check where max_vector_distance appears in config or docs.
evals.expected_output: Uses ide_search_text (with context='comments' for TODOs), ide_find_file for conftest, and ide_search_text for max_vector_distance. Does NOT fall back to Grep/Glob.
expectations: Used ide_search_text for TODO search (not Grep)
Used ide_search_text with context='comments' for TODO filtering
Used ide_find_file to find conftest files (not Glob)
Used ide_search_text for max_vector_distance search across all file types (not Grep)
Did NOT fall back to Grep/Glob for any of the three searches

evals.prompt: Show me the structure of SearchService, trace who calls the search method, and find all implementations of the Searcher protocol.
evals.expected_output: Uses ide_file_structure for SearchService, ide_call_hierarchy with callers for search method, ide_find_implementations for Searcher (or correctly handles Protocol limitation). Finds SearchService at application/search.py.
expectations: Used ide_file_structure to show SearchService structure (not reading whole file)
Used ide_call_hierarchy with direction=callers for the search method (not Grep)
Used ide_find_implementations for Searcher protocol (or correctly identified Protocol limitation and fell back to Grep)
Used ide_find_class or ide_find_symbol to locate SearchService first
